# Story Generation

## Description

Decompose requirements into user stories and system stories across all system layers. Create personas for user-facing stories. Stories are the contract between requirements and design — every requirement must be addressable by at least one story.

## Inputs (any of)

- `requirements.md` (standard path — derive stories from structured requirements)
- `intent.md` (if the team skips formal requirements, derive stories directly from intent)
- `wireframes/` (if the team started with wireframes, derive stories from screen flows)

## Outputs

- `stories.md`
- `personas.md`

## Owner

product-owner

## Contributors

- security-engineer
- solutions-architect
